title: aster altaicus var. decrescens
intro: Aster altaicus var. decrescens, also known as Korean aster or Altai mountain aster, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving pain, as well as showing potential in reducing inflammation and fighting against certain types of bacteria. Aster altaicus var. decrescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional Korean and Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
